subject: replacing our people who have left

emails.subject: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT
emails.subject_base: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT
emails.body: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT Louise Is it appropriate to replace the people who have left (Steve Walton and Susan Scott Lindberg) with other people that can do the work? Jim

emails.subject: Re: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT
emails.subject_base: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT
emails.body: Re: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT Can you talk to the appropriate commercial people and get them to decide? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld

emails.subject: Re: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT

emails.body: Re: REPLACING OUR PEOPLE WHO HAVE LEFT Yes. Thanks. Jim Steffes Enron
